chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 63 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2024 Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant/complainant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Bango, Advocate for respondents No.2 and 3. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- By consent, this application is allowed, and Criminal Case No.88/2023 (Re: State versus Soofan alias Muhammad Bux and others) is withdrawn from the file of learned Judicial Magistrate, Ranipur, and is transferred to learned Judicial Magistrate-II, Gambat with direction to expedite the matter and decide the same in accordance with law within three months. This transfer application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
